---
output: github_document
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# fussclust

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of fussclust is to provide the R implementation of classical fuzzy clustering models.

## Installation

You can install the development version of fussclust from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("kkmita/fussclust")
```
